subject: Re: Fwd: Need funds for WPH Corp
body:
ok


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, August 24, 2007 2:03:35 PM
Subject: Fwd: Need funds for WPH Corp


May I tell Peg to take $375,000 from Bear Stearns for now?  Please advise.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

Get a sneak peek of the all-new AOL.com.
Darren,
The JP Morgan account for WPH Corp is down to $12,000, after payments I 
made today for Purdey.  Please ask Jeffrey if I can get $375,000 from the 
WPH account at Bear Stearns.  I will need more funds very soon again, but 
since the Merrill Lynch account requires LHW to sign, it would be faster to 
get the $375,000 now from BS.

Bear Stearns        $377,074
Merrill Lynch       1,396,854

Thanks.
Peg
